hero.badge: Sri Lanka's First Integrated Care Platform
hero.title: Bridging the Gap in Continuous Care
hero.description: I-CAMS connects patients, nurses, and doctors in a unified platform for reliable, innovative, and accessible healthcare management. Real-time monitoring, seamless communication, and proactive care for chronic conditions.
hero.descriptionExtra: now with direct hospital connectivity, lab test tracking, and real-time care coordination across Sri Lanka.

overview.heading: What is I-CAMS?
overview.content: The Integrated Care Assessment and Monitoring System (I-CAMS) is a comprehensive digital health platform designed to revolutionize how patients, nurses, and doctors collaborate in delivering continuous care. By connecting all stakeholders in a unified ecosystem, I-CAMS enables real-time health monitoring, seamless communication, and data-driven clinical decision-making. Our mission is to bridge the gap in continuous care by providing reliable, innovative, and accessible tools that empower patients to take control of their health while enabling healthcare professionals to deliver more effective, coordinated care for chronic conditions.
overview.contentExtra: I-CAMS now connects patients directly with hospitals across Sri Lanka — enabling appointment booking, live lab test tracking, and seamless communication between every member of a care team.

hospital_workflow.title: From Doctor's Order to Lab Result — All in One App
hospital_workflow.description: I-CAMS now connects you directly to hospitals in Sri Lanka. Book doctor appointments, track your lab tests step-by-step, and receive results on your dashboard the moment the hospital uploads them.
hospital_workflow.point1: Browse & book appointments at 6+ Sri Lankan hospitals
hospital_workflow.point2: Doctor places lab or scan orders directly from the platform
hospital_workflow.point3: Hospital lab updates progress: Ordered → Collected → Processing → Results ready
hospital_workflow.point4: Patient sees the result the instant it's uploaded — with flagged values highlighted
hospital_workflow.point5: Nurse logs daily symptoms; doctor reviews and responds in-app

portals.heading: One Platform. Four Powerful Portals.
portals.description: Every role gets a dedicated, intelligent workspace — designed specifically for how they interact with healthcare.
portals.patientFeature3: Track lab tests in real time

community.title: Extending Quality Care Beyond the Hospital Walls
community.description: I-CAMS bridges the gap between hospital-based clinical teams and community care workers. Home-based nurses can submit assessments, log daily observations, and flag urgent needs — keeping the entire care team in sync while the patient recovers at home.
community.digitalLogsDesc: Replace paper-based records with secure digital logs
community.smartAlertsDesc: Instant notifications when a patient's status changes
community.teamCoordDesc: Nurses, doctors & carers on one platform
community.progressTrackingDesc: Chart recovery milestones and follow-up targets

innovation.title: Built for Sri Lanka. Built for the Future.
innovation.description: No other system in Sri Lanka connects patients, nurses, doctors, and hospitals in a single real-time workflow.
innovation.sriLankaFirstDesc: Designed specifically for the Sri Lankan healthcare landscape — government and private hospitals, local specializations, multilingual support (English, Sinhala, Tamil).
innovation.endToEndDesc: From booking a hospital appointment to receiving lab results on your phone — the entire care journey is digitized and visible to every authorized role in real time.
innovation.clinicalSecurityDesc: Patient data is protected with clinical-grade security standards. Role-based access ensures that only authorized personnel see sensitive information.
innovation.inAppCommDesc: Nurses flag concerns to doctors. Doctors reply with instructions. Patients receive updates. All within the app — no external messaging tools needed.
innovation.liveLabTrackerDesc: Patients can track every step of their lab test — from being ordered, sample collected, processing, to results ready — with timestamps at every stage.
innovation.mobileFirstDesc: Fully responsive and optimized for mobile. Elderly patients can log vitals from home, and nurses can submit assessments during ward rounds on any device.

about.title: Precision Care, Integrated.
about.description: Bridging the clinical gap through advanced digital monitoring and compassionate technology.
about.descriptionExtra: designed to modernize chronic care management and hospital connectivity across Sri Lanka.
about.badge: Sri Lanka's First Hospital-Connected Care Platform
about.challengeContent1: The current healthcare landscape in Sri Lanka remains heavily reliant on manual documentation and sporadic follow-ups. This creates a significant 'Technology Gap' between hospital care and patient experiences at home.
about.challengeContent2: Manual systems lead to delayed interventions, fragmented communication, and lack of standardized health data. For chronic condition management, this represents a critical barrier to optimal health outcomes.
about.challengeContent3: Sri Lankan patients with chronic conditions — diabetes, hypertension, COPD — often struggle with fragmented care: visiting the doctor at one place, doing lab tests at another, and receiving no digital feedback on results. I-CAMS was built to solve exactly this.
about.solutionContent1: I-CAMS bridges this gap through an integrated digital framework that simplifies healthcare monitoring into a seamless, role-based ecosystem.
about.solutionContent2: By centralizing real-time health logs, diagnostic trends, and secure communication, we empower all stakeholders with actionable data for precise, data-driven decision-making.
about.solutionContent3: Patients can now book appointments with doctors at Sri Lankan hospitals, track their lab tests step-by-step, and receive results directly on their dashboard. Nurses log vitals during home visits and flag concerns to doctors — who respond in-app. Hospitals manage lab queues and upload results that are instantly visible to patients.
about.builtForTeam: Built for Every Member of the Care Team
about.patientsDesc: Manage your health from home. Log vitals and symptoms, book hospital appointments, track lab test progress in real time, and stay connected with your care team — all from a single dashboard.
about.patientsAction3: Track lab tests step by step
about.nursesDesc: Deliver better care at the bedside or in the community. Log patient vitals using your phone during rounds, flag urgent concerns to doctors instantly, and track all active care orders.
about.nursesAction3: Flag concerns to doctor with 1 tap
about.nursesAction4: View and act on doctor's orders
about.doctorsDesc: A complete patient workspace at your fingertips. Review nurse observations, order lab tests or scans, write clinical notes, review results, and communicate with the care team — without switching systems.
about.hospitalAdminsDesc: Manage your hospital's patient pipeline efficiently. View today's appointment queue, update lab test statuses step by step, upload results, and oversee your doctor roster — all from one dashboard.
about.vision1: Our vision is to redefine chronic disease management and proactive care within the Sri Lankan healthcare system. We are committed to optimizing patient outcomes through technological innovation that is both robust and accessible.
about.vision2: I-CAMS is designed for every individual — transcending age demographics and care settings.
about.vision3: Whether it is pediatric monitoring, adult chronic care, post-surgical recovery, or geriatric support, I-CAMS provides comprehensive tools for all stages of life. We envision a future where technology and clinical expertise converge to create a more resilient and responsive healthcare infrastructure for all Sri Lankans — whether they are in Colombo, Kandy, or Galle.
about.realtimeMonitoringDesc: Continuous tracking of vital signs and symptoms, with automated risk-flagging for deteriorating conditions.
about.holisticCareDesc: Supports patients of all ages with specialized monitoring protocols and integrated care team communication.
about.liveLabIntegrationDesc: Hospital lab tests are tracked step-by-step and results are instantly visible to patients and doctors.
about.hospitalConnectedDesc: Directly integrated with 6+ Sri Lankan hospitals for appointment booking and lab workflow management.
about.dataIntegrityDesc: Secure, clinical-grade data handling with role-based access for professional medical use.
about.multilingualDesc: Full support for English, Sinhala, and Tamil — ensuring every Sri Lankan patient can use it comfortably.
about.readyToJoinDesc: Whether you're a patient, nurse, doctor, or hospital — your dedicated workspace is ready.

features_page.title: Clinical Capabilities
features_page.description: A streamlined digital ecosystem designed to optimize healthcare delivery and improve patient outcomes.
features_page.descriptionExtra: From booking a hospital appointment to receiving lab results in real time — I-CAMS covers the full care journey for patients, nurses, doctors, and hospital admins across Sri Lanka.
features_page.symptomBenefit: Enables early detection of deterioration through continuous patient data.
features_page.roleBenefit: Streamlines triage and reduces hospital overcrowding.
features_page.notificationBenefit: Triggers immediate medical responses to critical symptoms.
features_page.dashboardBenefit: Supports safe home monitoring with trend identification.
features_page.communicationBenefit: Enables seamless information exchange for proactive care.
features_page.journeyDesc: See how every feature connects — from appointment to results.
features_page.engineeredTitle: Engineered for Simplicity. Built for Impact.
features_page.engineeredDesc: I-CAMS replaces fragmented paper records, phone calls, and delayed results with a single connected platform — improving outcomes for every Sri Lankan involved in a care journey.

contact.title: Contact & Support
contact.description: We are here to support your journey towards better continuous care.
contact.messageDescription: Have questions about I-CAMS? Our team responds within 24 hours.
contact.messagePlaceholder: How can we help you today?
contact.multilingualDesc: English, සිංහල, and தமிழ் support is available for all users.
contact.hospitalRegistrationDesc: Join our network of healthcare providers optimizing clinical outcomes through integrated monitoring. Our team provides full technical integration and clinical staff training.
contact.helpDeskDesc: Encountering technical issues? Our 24/7 help desk ensures your health monitoring is never interrupted.

login.hospitalAdminDesc: Manage appointments, lab tests & patient flow

features_list.feature_0_desc: Log blood pressure, heart rate, SpO2, temperature, and weight from anywhere. View trends over time and get flagged when values go out of range.
features_list.feature_1_desc: Browse 6+ Sri Lankan hospitals, filter by city, specialization, or type (Government/Private), choose a doctor, and book a time slot — all from the app.
features_list.feature_2_desc: See every stage of your lab test in real time: Ordered → Sample Scheduled → Collected → Processing → Results Ready → Reviewed. Never wonder "where are my results?" again.
features_list.feature_3_desc: View detailed lab results with each value flagged as High 🔴, Low 🔵, or Normal ✅ against reference ranges. Doctor's review notes are displayed inline.
features_list.feature_4_desc: See all active orders from your doctor — medications, scans, lab tests, and referrals — clearly listed on your dashboard so you always know what to do next.
features_list.feature_5_desc: Communicate directly with your assigned doctor or nurse through the built-in secure messaging system. No external apps needed.
features_list.feature_6_desc: Select any assigned patient and instantly see their current status, active orders, flagged observations, and care notes — all in one clean interface.
features_list.feature_7_desc: Log full vital signs (BP, HR, SpO2, temperature, resp. rate, weight), a pain level slider (0–10), mood picker, symptom chip selector, and free-text notes — all in one form.
features_list.feature_8_desc: Mark any symptom log as urgent and it immediately appears as a flagged alert at the top of the doctor's patient workspace — ensuring critical concerns are never missed.
features_list.feature_9_desc: See all active clinical orders from the doctor — including medications to administer, lab tests scheduled, and any specific care instructions. Updated in real time.
features_list.feature_10_desc: Read clinical notes and requests left by the doctor and reply directly in a threaded format — creating a complete record of nurse-doctor communication per patient.
features_list.feature_11_desc: A comprehensive workspace for each patient: Overview, Nurse Logs, Lab Tests, Orders, and Clinical Notes — everything you need without switching systems.
features_list.feature_12_desc: Flagged nurse observations appear prominently at the top of the patient overview with vitals, timestamp, and a text field to reply directly — closing the care loop instantly.
features_list.feature_13_desc: Order lab tests, scans, medications, referrals, or physiotherapy sessions with a single click. Orders are immediately visible to the patient and the hospital.
features_list.feature_14_desc: View all ordered lab tests with their progress. When results are uploaded by the hospital, you can review values and save a note that the patient will also see.
features_list.feature_15_desc: Write structured clinical notes with assessment, plan, and requests to the nurse. Nurse replies are shown in a thread — creating a complete audit trail of care decisions.
features_list.feature_16_desc: See all of today's appointments, pending lab tests, results ready, and active doctors — at a glance. Priority badges (STAT/Urgent/Routine) highlight critical cases.
features_list.feature_17_desc: Advance any test through the pipeline one step at a time: Ordered → Sample Scheduled → Sample Collected → Processing → Results Ready. Add optional notes at each step.
features_list.feature_18_desc: Upload a result summary with a single click. The moment you upload, the patient's dashboard shows a green "Lab Results Ready!" notification — no delay, no manual notification.
features_list.feature_19_desc: View the full daily appointment schedule, sorted by time. See the patient name, assigned doctor and specialization, and confirmation status for each slot.
features_list.feature_20_desc: Manage your hospital's doctor directory — including specializations, consultation fees, availability, and language preferences — to help patients make informed booking choices.
features_list.feature_21_desc: I-CAMS fully supports English, Sinhala, and Tamil — ensuring every Sri Lankan patient can use it in their native language.
features_list.feature_22_desc: A carefully crafted dark mode (default) and light mode ensure comfortable viewing in any environment — from bright clinics to dim home settings.
features_list.feature_23_desc: Every page is fully optimized for mobile. Nurses can log symptoms during ward rounds, and patients can check results from their phones.
features_list.feature_24_desc: Each of the 4 roles (Patient, Nurse, Doctor, Hospital) has a completely separate login, separate dashboard, and separate data access — ensuring privacy and clarity.
